# Inactive GitHub workflows (archived)

These workflow files were moved out of `.github/workflows/` during P1-17 so GitHub Actions no longer executes them.

They are mostly era25 ops validate/integrity theater chains and duplicate execution-check wrappers. Active pilot and engineering gates remain in `.github/workflows/` (33 files, target ≤40).

Restore a workflow by moving it back to `.github/workflows/` and removing it from this folder.
